Standard Operating Procedures, under control.

SOP Manager lets your lab author procedures, brand every document, control versions and approvals, and generate audit-ready Word & PDF — from one self-contained file that runs in your browser.

SOP Manager
Runs in your browser Your data stays local Word & PDF output QMS-ready Works offline
Everything you need

One tool for the whole SOP lifecycle

From authoring a procedure to controlling versions and producing a polished, branded document.

Structured authoring

Build procedures from text, tables, and auto-numbered steps — with figures and tables inside each step, captioned and numbered automatically.

Branded templates

Set your logo, colours, header layout, sections, numbering, and signatures once. Lock the template so every document stays consistent.

Version & status control

Revise into new versions with a maintained change-history table, and track each SOP through Draft → In Review → Active → Retired.

Document library

Every SOP grouped by type and numbered, with search, filters, and one-click regeneration of the Word file.

Master index

Generate an audit-ready Master List of Controlled Documents — grouped, filtered, and branded — perfect as a cover or contents page.

Admin control & backup

An administrator lock freezes branding and numbering; export your whole setup as one file and hand it to another lab to restore.

Simple by design

How it works

From a blank page to a controlled document in three steps.

1

Set up once

Add your branding, document types, and default people — or import a ready-made configuration package.

2

Author & control

Write the procedure, add figures and tables, set the status, and revise with a tracked change history.

3

Generate & file

Produce a branded Word or PDF document, saved to your folder, and keep a master index for audits.

Good to know

Frequently asked

Where is my data stored?

Entirely on your own computer, in your browser. Nothing is uploaded — there's no account and no server. You can back up your whole setup to a single file at any time and keep a copy wherever you like.

What do I need to run it?

Just a modern browser. SOP Manager is a single HTML file — open it in Chrome or Edge for the full feature set (saving straight to a folder and auto-backup). It also works offline.

Can I use my own lab's branding?

Yes. Templates let you set your logo, colours, header layout, sections, numbering, and signature blocks. Lock a finished template so every document stays consistent, and hand a branded, locked configuration to another lab to restore.

Does it export to Word and PDF?

Both. Generate a clean, professionally formatted .docx (the editable master) and a print-quality PDF, saved straight to a folder you choose.

How are versions and approvals handled?

Revise an SOP into a new version and its change-history table updates automatically. Each document carries a colour-coded status from Draft through In Review and Active to Retired, with controlled numbering that never collides.
